items.title: Is Jalen Duren Really Worth $287 Million?
items.author: KG Certified
items.body_excerpt: Full Episode 🔗: https://youtu.be/P1MTJ8Ud6bY The Pistons have a $287 million decision to make on Jalen Duren. KG & Paul break down why the Cade-Duren fit has a ceiling problem, then pivot to Play GM with a Reaves-for-Duren trade idea that has actual teeth. Presented by…

items.title: Jeff Teague says Jaylen Brown got ROBBED of All-NBA 1st team | Club 520 x Celtics
items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Jeff Teague, DJ Wells, and B Hen react to Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown being left off the First-Team All-NBA roster, and the guys all agree that he got robbed, and that he should have made it. Jeff says that JB should have made it over Luka Doncic of the Los Angeles Lakers,…

items.title: Highest scoring average in the first quarter of playoff games this postseason:
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Highest scoring average in the first quarter of playoff games this postseason:
1. Jalen Brunson: 8.8
2. Stephon Castle: 7.1
3. Victor Wembanyama: 6.9

Highest scoring average in the fourth quarter of playoff games this postseason:
1. Jalen Brunson: 9.2
2. Cade Cunningham: 7.8
3. LeBron James: 7.4

items.title: Jamal Murray makes his first All-NBA team. Scottie Barnes snubbed. Jalen Johnson didn’t have an overall better year than him imo. Luka and Cade becoming eligible hurt Barnes, Jaylen Brown (second team instead of first) and KAT, amongst others.
items.author: Wolstat
items.body_excerpt:
Jamal Murray makes his first All-NBA team. Scottie Barnes snubbed. Jalen Johnson didn’t have an overall better year than him imo. Luka and Cade becoming eligible hurt Barnes, Jaylen Brown (second team instead of first) and KAT, amongst others. 
No LeBron for first time in decades

items.title: 2025-26 All-NBA teams:
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt:
2025-26 All-NBA teams:

First: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Nikola Jokic, Victor Wembanyama, Luka Doncic, Cade Cunningham

Second: Jaylen Brown, Kawhi Leonard, Kevin Durant, Jalen Brunson, Donovan Mitchell

Third: Tyrese Maxey, Jamal Murray, Jalen Johnson, Jalen Duren, Chet Holmgren

items.title: Jamal Murray would've been an All-NBA second teamer had the league followed its own rules and made Luka and Cade ineligible.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt:
Jamal Murray would've been an All-NBA second teamer had the league followed its own rules and made Luka and Cade ineligible.

Murray settles for third team, a goal of his nonetheless.

items.title: Cade Cunningham just became the first Piston to make All-NBA First Team since Grant Hill in 1996-97.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Cade Cunningham just became the first Piston to make All-NBA First Team since Grant Hill in 1996-97. 

He and Jalen Duren are the first Pistons duo to make All-NBA since Chauncey Billups and Ben Wallace in 2005-06.
